content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.40% and Bank Nifty -0.81% with VIX +2.65% to 17.06 — broad market in mild risk-off, but rotation is sharp into IT (+0.78% post-Coforge), Pharma (+0.59%), and select capital goods names. Book is +1.61% on day with 13 holdings already deployed at 63% — focus is on locking gains via trailing SLs on the strong movers (PNBHOUSING +10.5%, COFORGE +6.8%, HAL +4.8%, CAMS +4.2%) rather than chasing extended breakouts. Deployment is healthy; selective add only on highest-conviction setups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.5% winner near 52w high (1141.90). Current SL 1066.24 already locks +8.4% gain, sits 2% below CMP 1087.30 — respects 1% trail-gap floor. Raising target to 1140 (just below 52w high) to align with structural resistance. SL unchanged (already optimal trail level)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -0.6% near flat. SL 121 / target 135 intact. VIX rising supports gold thesis."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8% winner. SL 4725.56 locks +3.3%, sits 1.4% below CMP 4794 — within trail-gap discipline. Defense sector structural; new CMD + GE engine cadence catalysts intact. Maintaining current SL/target — no-op avoidance: actually leaving as-is via HOLD is cleaner."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1% on Q4 beat (PAT +124% YoY, EBITDA margin +875bps). SL 6960 sits 1.2% below CMP 7046.50 — tight but within trail-gap floor. Stock hit 7200 lifetime high last week; respects volatile breakout. Hold to allow run to target 7400."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% near flat after Friday's 13% gap. SL 836 just 0.5% below CMP 840.65 — already tighter than 1% trail-gap ideal but legacy entry SL; will let it ride rather than loosen. Allow Mumbai Metro order momentum to play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% near flat. Q4 PAT +30.6% YoY, lending book crossed Rs 2 lakh cr. SL 365 = -1.1% from entry, intact. Allow time for thesis to play."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% winner on Q4 print (revenue +22%, India volume +9%). Tightening SL from breakeven 820 to 822 (entry+₹2) to lock token gain. SL sits 1.3% below CMP 832.90 — respects trail-gap floor."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.8% winner after Q4 PAT +124% / revenue +30% YoY beat. SL 1329.47 locks +5.6% gain, sits 1.2% below CMP 1345.20 — respects trail-gap. Holding target 1395 aligned with brokerage TP momentum. No-op avoidance: actually new SL/target both equal stored — converting to HOLD is correct."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.5% winner. FY26 revenue +38% / PAT +41.8% structural. SL 3025 = entry (breakeven), 1.5% below CMP 3071.40 — within trail-gap. Concall May 12 catalyst pending. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.2% winner near 52w high 875. SL 827.41 locks +2.7% gain, sits 1.5% below CMP 840 — respects trail-gap. Volume 7.4x today on Q4 print. Holding existing levels — both unchanged so this is effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.8% on intraday fade after gapping +8.5% on Q4 (PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +280bps). SL 1445 = -3% from entry, intact. Within normal volatility absorption range — Rule 17 respect. Hold to target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% intraday fade despite Q4 PAT +87.5%, US sales +56.9%. Concall TODAY (May 8) pending — held into binary, but sub-2% stake + entry already absorbed wobble. SL 2400 = -2.8%, intact. Will let Q4 concall play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2% near flat after Q4 turnaround (PAT Rs 164cr vs -Rs 45cr). Zaynich USFDA NDA accepted — structural innovation story. SL 1545 = -4.5%, wide but commensurate with high-vol pharma. Hold to target 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT 25x @ 2015 placed 6h ago. Stock rallied today (auto components +8.41% sector leader); LIMIT 2015 likely below CMP. Letting it sit — if it doesn't fill EOD will reassess tomorrow. Per Rule 9, no stacking duplicate."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "reasoning": "+10.5%, SL 1066 already locks +8.4%. Current trail acceptable; not tightening further to avoid forced exit on noise."
    },
    {

    },
    {

    },
    {

    },

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, SL 836 protects entry."
    },
    {

      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "-0.8% within entry-SL band; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL from 820 (breakeven) to 822 to lock token gain on +1.4% move; 1.3% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+6.8%, SL 1329.47 locks +5.6% — strong trail already in place."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.5%, SL at breakeven. Concall May 12 ahead."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+4.2%, SL 827.41 locks +2.7% — respects trail-gap discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 already-priced fade; SL 1445 absorbs noise. Per Rule 17, no preemptive exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Intraday wobble pre-concall; SL 2400 intact at -2.8%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near flat; SL 1545 wide but appropriate for pharma vol post-Q4."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed BULLISH-rated non-held candidates explicitly per Rule 18: (1) THERMAX (+0.03 modifier, NEUTRAL): Q4 PAT +18% solid but underperforming sector ATH peers; up 10.67% today extended — pass on chasing. (2) SRF / FINCABLES / POLYCAB: not enough data depth in this batch; +9-10% single-day moves are extended, prefer waiting for pullback. (3) BHARATFORG: existing OPEN LIMIT @ 2015 covers exposure. (4) SOBHA: high-vol on down day = distribution concern, pass. (5) INDUSINDBK: governance overhang (SFIO/SEBI) per Rule 13 — NO_ACTION default. (6) LAURUSLABS / KPIL / TATATECH / GABRIEL: no per-stock research depth; skip. Deployment at 63% with 13 names already covering BFSI / Defense / Capital Goods / Pharma / Specialty Chem / FMCG / IT / Realty proxies — book is well-diversified. Cash buffer 37% appropriate given VIX +2.65% rising to 17.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 19, book +1.61% intraday with 9 of 13 positions in the green and 3 winners >+4% (PNBHOUSING +10.5%, COFORGE +6.8%, HAL +4.8%, CAMS +4.2%). Trailing SLs are in good shape — locking ₹8K+ on PNBHOUSING alone. Risk-off bias (VIX rising, Nifty -0.4%) argues against piling on new entries; preserving the gains and letting the bullish-rated positions run is the right call. 5-day rolling profit factor 1.1x is improving. Rule 18 audit: no zero-admit dormancy concern — book is at 63% deployed (above the 'under-deployed' bar), so passive cycles on extended breakouts are defensible. Lupin concall today is the one binary to monitor."
}
